name: arcade-gateway-hub
description: Your Arcade gateways — curated sets of apps and tools (Slack, Gmail, GitHub, Calendar, Notion, Linear, and more) over one connection.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to the Arcade Gateway Hub (https://hub.arcadeagent.dev/mcp). Ask for what you want; the right tool from your active Arcade gateway runs, with one-time app sign-ins handled in the browser. Includes Arcade_SelectGateway to view and switch gateways. Requires Node.js (uses the pinned mcp-remote proxy to bridge Claude Desktop's stdio transport to the hosted server).
